title: End-of-year contact review with activity audit, protected list, enrichment, and summary
instruction:
Perform an end-of-year contact review. Complete all of the following steps:

1. AUDIT: Page through all contacts. For each contact, search the inbox for emails from that person within the last 90 days (since December 20, 2025). Identify contacts with zero email activity in that period.

2. PROTECTED LIST: Open the email from your manager Grace Lin with subject "Protected Contacts — Do Not Delete". This email lists 4 contacts by name that must NOT be deleted regardless of activity: Patricia Engel, Kenji Matsuda, Ines Herrera, and Tobias Falk.

3. DELETE INACTIVE: Delete every contact that has zero email activity in the last 90 days AND is NOT on Grace's protected list. Based on the seeded data, this should be exactly 3 contacts: Rupert Haines <r.haines@oldvendor.com>, Simone Arcuri <s.arcuri@legacypartner.it>, and Chen Wei-Lin <w.chen@discontinuedclient.tw>.

4. UPDATE NOTES: Find the most recent thread from each of the following 4 contacts and update their note with the specified information:
   - Patricia Engel: set note to her new role from her latest email signature ("Chief Revenue Officer at Engel & Partners")
   - Kenji Matsuda: set note to the project name mentioned in his latest thread subject ("Project Sakura — Phase 2")
   - Ines Herrera: set note to the conference name she mentions in her latest email body ("WebSummit Lisbon 2026")
   - Tobias Falk: set note to his new phone number from his latest email signature ("+49 170 555 8823")

5. ADD NEW: Three people have emailed you recently but have no contact entry. Add contacts for:
   - Nadia Kowalski <n.kowalski@freshstart.pl> with note "Inbound lead — March 2026"
   - Ravi Sundaram <r.sundaram@deltaforge.in> with note "Referred by Kenji Matsuda"
   - Amara Diallo <a.diallo@sahelconsulting.sn> with note "Conference connection — WebSummit"

6. SUMMARY: Compose a new email (not reply) to Grace Lin (g.lin@company.com) with subject "Annual Contact Review — Complete" and body listing:
   - "Deleted: Chen Wei-Lin, Rupert Haines, Simone Arcuri"
   - "Updated: Ines Herrera, Kenji Matsuda, Patricia Engel, Tobias Falk"
   - "Added: Amara Diallo, Nadia Kowalski, Ravi Sundaram"
eval_check_descriptions: Patricia Engel note updated with current role
Kenji Matsuda note updated with project name
Ines Herrera note updated with conference
Tobias Falk note updated with phone number
Summary email composed (not reply) to Grace Lin
Summary email lists all deleted contacts

emails.subject: Introduction — Potential Collaboration
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

My name is Nadia Kowalski and I lead business development at FreshStart. I'd love to explore a potential collaboration with your team.

Thanks,
Nadia

emails.subject: Introduction via Kenji Matsuda
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Kenji Matsuda suggested I reach out to you regarding the Delta Forge platform. Would be great to set up an intro call.

Thanks,
Ravi

emails.subject: Great meeting you at WebSummit
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Great meeting you at WebSummit. I'd love to continue our conversation about the Sahel market opportunities.

Thanks,
Amara

emails.subject: Project Sakura — Phase 2 Kickoff
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Excited to kick off Phase 2 of Project Sakura. I'll send the detailed timeline by end of week.

Thanks,
Kenji

emails.subject: Conference Plans
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Looking forward to seeing you at WebSummit Lisbon 2026. Let's plan to meet up during the networking sessions.

Thanks,
Ines

emails.subject: Active Client Status Update
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Everything is on track for the March deliverable. No blockers on our end.

Thanks,
Wei

emails.subject: Q1 Revenue Forecast
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Sharing the updated Q1 revenue forecast. Let me know if you need the breakdown by region.

---
Patricia Engel | Chief Revenue Officer | Engel & Partners

emails.subject: New Vendor Proposal
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Please find attached our updated proposal for the Q2 supply agreement.

Thanks,
Rupesh

emails.subject: Global Consulting Engagement
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Following up on our discussion about the consulting engagement for Q2. I'll have the SOW ready by Friday.

Thanks,
Rupert

emails.subject: Operations Sync
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Can we schedule a quick sync on the Berlin operations next week?

---
Tobias Falk | BerlinOps
Phone: +49 170 555 8823
